heading: Limitation on administrative expenses
label: 285m–6 Limitation on administrative expenses
text: With respect to amounts appropriated for a fiscal year for the National Institutes of Health, the limitation established in on the expenditure of such amounts for administrative expenses shall apply to administrative expenses of the National Institute on Deafness and Other Communication Disorders.section 284c(a)(1) of this title
notes: Codificationand contained identical provisions enacting this section. See 1988 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 100–553section 2613(a)(1) of Pub. L. 100–690

Amendments1993— substituted “section 284c(a)(1)” for “section 284c(b)(1)”.Pub. L. 103–431988—, amended this section to read as if the amendments made by , which enacted this section, had not been enacted. See Codification note above.Pub. L. 100–690, § 2613(b)(2)Pub. L. 100–690, § 2613(a)(1)
